Home / Services / Landscape Design & Installation

Landscape Design & Installation

Create the outdoor oasis you've always dreamed of with our design and installation services.

Transform your outdoor space with our landscape design and installation services. We work closely with you to create a custom landscape design that reflects your personal style and enhances the beauty and functionality of your property. From initial concept to final installation, we handle every aspect of the project with precision and care.

Our landscape design services include site analysis, concept development, plant selection, hardscape design, and irrigation planning. We take into account the unique characteristics of your property, including soil type, sun exposure, and drainage, to create a design that is both beautiful and sustainable. We also consider your budget and lifestyle to ensure that the final result meets your needs and exceeds your expectations.

Our installation services include planting, hardscaping, irrigation system installation, and lighting. We use only the highest quality materials and employ skilled craftsmen to ensure that every project is completed to the highest standards. Whether you're looking to create a relaxing backyard retreat, a vibrant front yard landscape, or a functional outdoor living space, we can help you bring your vision to life.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Initial consultation to discuss your vision and budget.
  2. 02 Step 2: Site analysis and concept development.
  3. 03 Step 3: Presentation of landscape design and plant selection.
  4. 04 Step 4: Professional installation of plants, hardscapes, and irrigation systems.

Benefits

  • Increased property value
  • Enhanced curb appeal
  • Functional outdoor living space
  • Personalized design

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does landscape design and installation cost?

The cost of landscape design and installation varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We offer free consultations and estimates to provide you with an accurate cost breakdown.

What types of plants are best suited for Oklahoma City?

We recommend native and drought-tolerant plants that are well-adapted to Oklahoma's climate. Some popular choices include Oklahoma Redbud, Eastern Red Cedar, and Black-Eyed Susans.

Do you offer irrigation system installation?

Yes, we offer complete irrigation system installation services, including design, installation, and maintenance. We can help you choose the right system for your landscape and ensure that it is properly installed and maintained.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with landscape design & installation? Contact us today.
